reference: Hi, good evening. Polycystic ovary syndrome and hypothyroidism are easily treatable conditions. Follow your gynecologist's advice regularly to regulate your menstrual cycle. Then there should not be a problem with your conception. Check your thyroid-stimulating hormone levels regularly as well. Start taking folic acid under your gynecologist's supervision. Good luck.
text: Hi, good evening. Polycystic ovary syndrome and hypothyroidism are easily treatable conditions; follow your gynecologist's advice regularly to regulate your menstrual cycle. Then there should not be a problem with your conception; check your thyroid stimulating hormone levels regularly as well. Start taking folic acid under your gynecologist's supervision. Good luck.
